# TekMemo

> TekMemo is a file-first memory runtime for AI agents and coding assistants. It gives LLMs durable, project-scoped context so they stay accurate and consistent across sessions. Memory lives as plain text and JSON in a `.tekmemo/` folder (local) or in TekMemo Cloud (hosted).

TekMemo is published as three packages:
- `@tekbreed/tekmemo` — the core memory runtime (the `Tekmemo` client, filesystem store, graph memory, recall, cloud client, AI SDK helpers).
- `@tekbreed/tekmemo-cli` — the `tekmemo` CLI for terminal and CI workflows.
- `@tekbreed/tekmemo-mcp-server` — a self-hostable MCP server (stdio) for agent integration.

## Quick start

Install the core runtime and start recording memory in code:

```bash
npm install @tekbreed/tekmemo
```

```ts
import { Tekmemo } from "@tekbreed/tekmemo";

const memo = new Tekmemo({ rootDir: "./.tekmemo", projectId: "my-app" });
await memo.notes.record({ content: "Use D1 for tenant metadata.", kind: "decision" });
const hits = await memo.recall("database decisions");
```

## Docs

- Overview & quick start: https://oss.tekbreed.com/packages/tekmemo/
- Installation: https://oss.tekbreed.com/packages/tekmemo/installation
- The `Tekmemo` client (modes, strategies, API surface): https://oss.tekbreed.com/packages/tekmemo/client
- Configuration (resolution chain, env vars, config.json): https://oss.tekbreed.com/packages/tekmemo/configuration
- Core concepts: https://oss.tekbreed.com/packages/tekmemo/concepts
- Filesystem layout: https://oss.tekbreed.com/packages/tekmemo/filesystem-layout
- Cloud client: https://oss.tekbreed.com/packages/tekmemo/cloud-client
- Architecture: https://oss.tekbreed.com/packages/tekmemo/architecture/

## Runtime modes

`Tekmemo` supports four runtime modes, selected in config: `local` (filesystem), `cloud` (TekMemo Cloud), `hybrid` (local + cloud with read/write policies), and `memory` (volatile, for tests).

- Local vs cloud vs hybrid: https://oss.tekbreed.com/packages/tekmemo/client
- Configuration resolution: https://oss.tekbreed.com/packages/tekmemo/configuration

## MCP (Model Context Protocol)

Two ways to expose TekMemo to coding agents:

- **Hosted server** (cloud-only): `https://mcp.memo.tekbreed.com/` over Streamable HTTP, bearer-token auth, read-only by default. Docs: https://oss.tekbreed.com/packages/mcp/hosted
- **Self-hosted stdio server** (`@tekbreed/tekmemo-mcp-server`): supports `local`, `cloud`, `hybrid`, and `memory` modes for file-first memory. Docs: https://oss.tekbreed.com/packages/mcp/

Client setup (Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, etc.) for both paths: https://oss.tekbreed.com/packages/mcp/client-setup

## CLI

- CLI guide: https://oss.tekbreed.com/packages/cli/
- Local commands: https://oss.tekbreed.com/packages/cli/local-commands
- Cloud commands: https://oss.tekbreed.com/packages/cli/cloud-commands

## API reference

- Modules overview: https://oss.tekbreed.com/api/tekmemo/
- Cloud client API: https://oss.tekbreed.com/api/tekmemo/cloud-client
- AI SDK helpers: https://oss.tekbreed.com/api/tekmemo/ai-sdk

## Cloud

TekMemo Cloud base URL: `https://api.tekbreed.com/memo/v1`. Authenticate with a TekMemo API key (`tk_live_...`), kept server-side. Cloud is optional — local file-first memory works with zero cloud setup.
